title: Manager - SAP Master Data Governance Consulting

titleByLocale.it: Manager - SAP Master Data Governance Consulting
titleByLocale.en: Manager - SAP Master Data Governance Consulting
titleByLocale.de: Manager - SAP Master Data Governance Consulting
titleByLocale.fr: Manager - SAP Master Data Governance Consulting

descriptionByLocale.it:
As one of the leading global professional services firms, PwC offers a wide range of consulting services across various industries, helping organisations navigate complex challenges and achieve their strategic goals. We work closely with clients to provide tailored solutions that address their specific needs, whether it's developing innovative strategies, improving operational efficiency, or leveraging emerging technologies.

• Lead and support large-scale projects focusing on S/4HANA or SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) within Switzerland and internationally.

• Collaborate with clients to assess and enhance their master data governance processes, leveraging SAP Master Data Governance (MDG) solutions to ensure data accuracy and consistency.

• Guide clients from the conceptualization of initial ideas through to successful operational implementation, ensuring seamless integration of SAP MDG solutions.

• Design and enhance SAP standard software solutions, tailoring them to meet specific client needs and industry standards.

• Develop custom applications and integrate various software solutions to optimize client operations and data management strategies.

• Bachelor's or master's degree in business, IT, engineering, business information systems, or a related field.

• 3 to 6 years of experience in process consulting and implementation of SAP solutions, with a focus on SAP Master Data Governance and a deep understanding of associated business processes.

• Proven expertise in implementing SAP MDG for Customer, Vendor, Material, or Financial domains, translating business process requirements into technical solutions.

• Experience in process modeling, including entity and business activity changes, workflow design, data replication techniques, and master data conversion.

• Strong analytical skills with practical experience in process analysis and design across various industries.

• Fluency in English and German; additional languages are advantageous.

title: Manager & Senior Manager in Life Sciences Quality Management Consulting

titleByLocale.it: Manager & Senior Manager in Life Sciences Quality Management Consulting
titleByLocale.en: Manager & Senior Manager in Life Sciences Quality Management Consulting
titleByLocale.de: Manager & Senior Manager in Life Sciences Qualität Management Consulting
titleByLocale.fr: Manager & Senior Manager in Life Sciences Qualité Management Consulting

descriptionByLocale.it:
• Help sell, lead and, together with the team, deliver high-impact projects engaging with senior stakeholders from high-profile clients in the life sciences industry.

• Help develop new ideas and propositions to share with clients to secure new and expand existing projects. Projects typically include the design and implementation of new technologies, quality systems processes, operating models, digital strategies and ways of working across R&D, manufacturing / supply chain and commercial. This includes driving business performance through changing quality culture / mind-sets, improving processes and procedures, benefitting from process automation and enabling insights from advanced analytics and AI. The outcomes we help clients deliver include driving faster development, manufacturing and commercial timelines, exploiting internal and external data through advanced analytics and machine learning, improving quality and compliance amongst many others.

• The functions covered include all those across R&D, manufacturing and commercial, with particular focus on quality management / assurance, regulatory affairs, product safely and medical affairs. The role will also work closely with our consulting teams covering commercial, market access and other functions across the Life Sciences value chain.

• Work with international clients and we will provide you the opportunity to gain experience working in multi-cultural teams within Switzerland and abroad.

• Be collaborating with PwC's global network of Life Sciences experts, you will have access to our market leading propositions, methodologies, assets and training materials.

• Work in a fast growing team. The environment is driven by respect, collegiality, strong team spirit, winning as team not as an individual.

• Bachelor's or Master's degree in a science-related discipline plus around 6 years' experience working in life sciences, within R&D, manufacturing or commercial at a life sciences company. Out of the 6 years you have at least 3 years experiences working as a consultant.

• In consulting, you will have experience in working & running large transformation projects, with experience in developing new propositions and developing new work. From industry, you will have been exposed to many of the key steps of improving quality in regulated business functions.

• Exposure in innovations in technology/cloud/RWD/NLP that drove/could drive business performance, simplification and/or patient centricity in the health industries and markets.

• Exposure to some of the following areas: GxP, data privacy / protection, digital strategy development, operating model design, quality system design / improvement / maintenance, process improvement, technology implementation and digital & analytics technologies in a GxP regulated environment.

• Pay attention to detail, have strong problem-solving skills and are technologically proficient.

• Excellent teamworking, interpersonal, listening and communication skills.

• Fluent in English and ideally have knowledge of German and/or French and you have travel mobility to serve international clients.

• Passionate team player during worktime and enjoy socializing with clients and colleagues after work.

title: Manager and Senior Manager in Life Sciences R&D Management Consulting

titleByLocale.it: Manager and Senior Manager in Life Sciences R&D Management Consulting
titleByLocale.en: Manager and Senior Manager in Life Sciences R&D Management Consulting
titleByLocale.de: Manager and Senior Manager in Life Sciences R&D Management Consulting
titleByLocale.fr: Manager and Senior Manager in Life Sciences R&D Management Consulting

descriptionByLocale.it:
As a Manager / Senior Manager in our fast growing Life Sciences R&D Consulting team, you will be at the heart of transforming how leading pharma, biotech and medtech organisations discover, develop and deliver therapies to patients. You will:
• Sell, lead and deliver high impact projects – Shape and close new opportunities, then lead diverse teams to deliver complex programmes that improve R&D productivity, accelerate development timelines, enhance quality and compliance, and unlock new value for our clients.

• Develop new ideas and propositions – Identify emerging client needs and industry trends, and turn them into distinctive consulting offerings, thought leadership and market leading solutions that you will take directly to clients.

• Work cross functionally across the value chain – Solve end to end challenges spanning R&D, manufacturing and commercial, helping clients break down silos and design integrated operating models, processes and technologies. Collaborate across borders and disciplines – Work with international clients and teams, partnering closely with PwC's global network of life sciences, digital, data/AI and change specialists to bring the best of PwC to every engagement.

• Shape a high growth practice – Play a key role in building our rapidly expanding team: developing our people, strengthening our culture, and helping to define how we work and what we take to market as we scale.
You'll work on mission critical issues for top tier life sciences companies, while contributing directly to the growth and direction of a dynamic and entrepreneurial practice within PwC.

• Bachelor's or Master's degree in a science related discipline (e.g. life sciences, chemistry, biomedical engineering, pharmacy or related field)

• At least 6 years' relevant work experience, with a strong track record of delivering results in complex environments

• Minimum 3 years' experience in the consulting industry (mandatory), ideally with exposure to life sciences / healthcare clients

• Fluency in English (written and spoken); additional knowledge of German and/or French is highly desirable

• Willingness and ability to travel to serve international clients as needed

• Experience utilizing AI in both client delivery and as consulting tools

What gives you a competitive edge:

• Experience working with a start up or entrepreneurial mentality – proactive, hands on, and comfortable building from a blank sheet

• High comfort with ambiguity and change, with the ability to adapt quickly and remain effective in uncertain or evolving situations

• Proven ability to manage complexity – across multi workstream projects, diverse stakeholder groups and global organisations

• Agile and intellectually curious mindset, continuously seeking new ways to solve problems, learn new topics and apply innovative approaches

• Good understanding of the clinical development lifecycle and associated functions, such as:
* Portfolio and scenario planning
* Regulatory strategy and submissions
* Pre commercialisation activities (e.g. market access, medical affairs, launch readiness)
* Commercialisation activities (e.g. go to market strategy, brand planning, lifecycle management)

• Demonstrated experience in sales and business development, including identifying opportunities, contributing to proposals and pitches, and building long term client relationships

title: Manager / Senior Manager - Digitale Transformation (Public Sector Strategy & Transformation)

titleByLocale.it: Manager / Senior Manager - Digitale Transformation (Public Sector Strategy & Transformation)
titleByLocale.en: Manager / Senior Manager - Digitale Transformation (Public Sector Strategy & Transformation)
titleByLocale.de: Manager / Senior Manager - Digitale Transformation (Public Sector Strategy & Transformation)
titleByLocale.fr: Manager / Senior Manager - Digitale Transformation (Public Sector Strategy & Transformation)

descriptionByLocale.it:
• Gestalte die digitale Transformation des öffentlichen Sektors an der Schnittstelle von Politik, Management und Technologie – indem du Entscheidungsträger dabei unterstützt, zukunftsgerichtete Strategien zu erarbeiten, Organisationen weiterzuentwickeln und den Einsatz neuer Technologien wirkungsvoll zu steuern.

• Übernimm Verantwortung für die Akquisition und Leitung von Projekten und entwickle gemeinsam mit unseren Kunden innovative Lösungen für die Verwaltung und den Service public im digitalen Zeitalter.

• Denke unternehmerisch, erkenne frühzeitig Trends und Chancen und trage aktiv zum Ausbau unserer Kundenbeziehungen sowie zur Weiterentwicklung unseres Leistungsportfolios bei.

• Sei Teil eines engagierten Public-Sector-Teams, übernimm Führungsverantwortung und fördere gezielt die Entwicklung unserer Mitarbeitenden sowie deine eigene.

• Ausbildung: Hochschulabschluss (Universität/ETH), Fachrichtung frei wählbar; Weiterbildungen und Zertifikate wie HERMES Advanced und TOGAF von Vorteil.

• Berufserfahrung: Mindestens 5 Jahre relevante Erfahrung in der Strategieberatung oder in einer vergleichbaren Stabsfunktion, mit Fokus auf Strategie-, Organisationsentwicklung und digitale Transformation im öffentlichen Sektor (Behörden, staatsnahe Betriebe u.Ä.).

• Netzwerk: Etabliertes und aktives Netzwerk im öffentlichen Sektor in der Schweiz.

• Politik & Technologie: Fundiertes Verständnis politischer Prozesse sowie aktueller technologischer Entwicklungen und deren Auswirkungen auf die öffentiche Hand.

• Kommunikation: Überzeugende Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Deutsch und Englisch (mündlich und schriftlich); Französischkenntnisse sind ein Plus.

• Analytik: Ausgeprägte analytische und konzeptionelle Fähigkeiten sowie eine strukturierte Arbeitsweise mit der Fähigkeit, komplexe Fragestellungen schnell zu durchdringen und in umsetzbare Lösungen zu überführen.

• Persönlichkeit: Hohe Eigeninitiative, unternehmerisches Denken, starke Teamorientierung und ausgeprägte Lernbereitschaft.

title: Director in Quality & Regulatory Management - Advisory Services

titleByLocale.it: Direttore in Quality & Regulatory Management - Advisory Services
titleByLocale.en: Director in Quality & Regulatory Management - Advisory Services
titleByLocale.de: Direktor in Qualität & Regulatory Management - Advisory Services
titleByLocale.fr: Directeur in Qualité & Regulatory Management - Advisory Services

descriptionByLocale.it:
• Sell, lead and, together with the team, deliver high-impact projects engaging with senior stakeholders from high-profile clients. You will actively drive business development by originating opportunities, leading proposals and converting them into successful client engagements.

• Develop new ideas and propositions to share with clients to secure new and expand existing projects. The projects typically include: (i) Quality and QMS strategy, operating model and target‑state design, (ii) Regulatory strategy and operating model design (e.g. for submissions, registrations, labelling, post‑market / lifecycle management), (iii) Design and implementation of new technologies and ways of working, (iv) Digital strategies and functional roadmaps

• Cover Quality and Regulatory functional expertise across the value chain. You will also work closely with our consulting teams covering commercial, market access, supply chain and other functions.

• Drive the growth and transformation of our Quality and Regulatory team, capabilities and consulting business. You will work closely with PwC's global network of experts and our enterprise AI team to develop and scale new, AI‑enabled propositions, delivery models and assets – both for our clients and for how we operate at PwC.

• Actively build and expand your own network and represent PwC at client meetings, industry events and conferences.

• Work in a fast-growing environment, which is driven by respect, collegiality, and strong team spirit (winning as team, not as an individual).

• You have more than 10 years' experience working within Quality and/or Regulatory, of which at least 6 years in consulting. 

• In consulting, you will have worked or are working in a management consulting firm, advising clients on Quality and Regulatory strategy, and you have experience in running large transformation projects and developing new propositions and work.

• In industry roles, you have been exposed to many of the key steps of improving business functions that operate along the value chain.

• As an experienced hire, you have a solid track record in both business development and project delivery: you originate and shape opportunities, lead proposal processes and successfully convert them into client engagements. You leverage a strong personal industry network with decision-makers along the value chain and are passionate about networking and building long-term client relationships.

• You have exposure to some of the following areas: GxP and other relevant regulatory frameworks, data privacy/protection, digital strategy development, operating model design, system design/improvement/maintenance, process improvement, technology implementation and digital and analytics technologies, including AI and practical use cases in Quality and Regulatory functions.

title: Tax Manager International M&A and Structuring, Financial Services

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile Fiscale Internazionale M&A e Strutturazione, Servizi Finanziari
titleByLocale.en: Tax Manager International M&A and Structuring, Financial Services
titleByLocale.de: Steuerberater International M&A und Strukturierung, Finanzdienstleistungen
titleByLocale.fr: Responsable Fiscalité Internationale M&A et Structuration, Services Financiers

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Entra a far parte di un team eterogeneo e multinazionale in cui potrai crescere e assumere responsabilità. - Potrai svilupparti appieno in un ambiente di lavoro caratterizzato da spirito di squadra, fiducia e supporto reciproco. - Acquisirai competenze tecniche approfondite e soft skills attraverso formazione on-the-job e off-the-job. Lavora nel nostro team fiscale internazionale in crescita per i servizi finanziari a Zurigo e concentrati specificamente su M&A e ristrutturazioni. - Fornisci consulenza fiscale in modo proattivo a una clientela diversificata, composta principalmente da clienti di private equity e immobiliare, offrendo consulenza sulle implicazioni fiscali internazionali relative a fusioni, acquisizioni e ristrutturazioni. - Assumi la leadership nella gestione e coordinamento di progetti internazionali di M&A e ristrutturazione, che includono due diligence fiscale, strutturazione fiscale, revisione degli SPA, modellizzazione fiscale e servizi di consulenza post-completamento, avvalendoti del supporto di associati e senior associate. - Collabora con il team per sviluppare la pratica dei servizi finanziari, private equity e immobiliare, al fine di rafforzare le relazioni con i clienti, ampliare la base clienti e diversificare l’offerta di servizi. ## Requisiti - Laurea magistrale o laurea di primo livello con votazione sopra la media in economia aziendale, economia o giurisprudenza. - Specializzazione in fiscalità / fiscalità internazionale; un LLM in fiscalità internazionale rappresenta un plus. - Almeno 4 anni di esperienza rilevante in fiscalità e questioni fiscali relative a M&A in un contesto internazionale. - Esperienza con clienti di private equity o immobiliare è considerata un plus. - Esperienza nella gestione e coordinamento di progetti fiscali multinazionali. - Capacità di guidare e formare un team di senior associate / associate in progetti fiscali complessi. - Flessibilità, perseveranza, apertura verso situazioni sfidanti e complesse, personalità orientata al team e al cliente con eccellenti capacità comunicative. - Al confine tra economia e diritto, hai un’attitudine per i numeri, i modelli e le valutazioni, nonché per le questioni giuridiche sottostanti. - Ottime competenze scritte e orali in inglese; il tedesco e/o altre lingue sono un plus.
descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione - Become part of a diverse and multinational team in which you will be able to grow and take over responsibility. - You can fully develop in a working environment characterized by team spirit, trust and mutual support. - You will acquire comprehensive technical know-how and soft skills through on-and-off-the-job training. - Work in our growing international corporate financial services tax team in Zurich and you will have a specific focus on M&A and restructuring. - Proactively provide tax expertise to a diverse client portfolio consisting of primarily private equity and real estate clients, encompassing advice on international tax implications in relation to mergers, acquisitions and restructurings. - Take the lead in managing and coordinating multi-country M&A and restructuring projects consisting of tax due diligence, tax structuring, SPA review, tax modelling and post completion tax advisory services thereby leveraging on the support of associates and senior associates. - Work with the team to develop the financial services, private equity and real estate practice to broaden the strengthen the client relationships, broaden the client base and diversify the service offering. ## Requisiti - A master's degree or an above-average bachelor degree in business administration, economics or law. - A focus on tax / international tax; an LLM in international tax would be considered an asset. - At least 4 years of relevant experience in taxation and M&A related tax matters in an international environment. - Experience with private equity or real estate clients is considered an asset. - You have experience in managing and coordinating of multi-country tax projects. - Ability to lead and coach a team of senior associates / associates on a complex tax project. - You are flexible, persistent, open to challenging and complex situations and have a team and customer-oriented personality with excellent communication skills. - At the interface between economics and law, you have a flair for numbers, models and evaluations as well as for the underlying legal issues. - You have very good written and spoken English skills; German and/or additional language skills are a plus.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung - Werden Sie Teil eines vielfältigen und internationalen Teams, in dem Sie wachsen und Verantwortung übernehmen können. - Sie können sich in einem Arbeitsumfeld voll entfalten, das durch Teamgeist, Vertrauen und gegenseitige Unterstützung geprägt ist. - Sie erwerben umfassendes Fachwissen und Soft Skills durch On-the-Job- und Off-the-Job-Trainings. Arbeiten Sie in unserem wachsenden internationalen Steuerteam für Finanzdienstleistungen in Zürich und konzentrieren Sie sich dabei speziell auf M&A und Restrukturierungen. - Bieten Sie proaktiv Steuerberatung für ein vielfältiges Kundenportfolio an, das hauptsächlich aus Private-Equity- und Immobilienkunden besteht, und beraten Sie zu internationalen Steuerimplikationen im Zusammenhang mit Fusionen, Übernahmen und Restrukturierungen. - Übernehmen Sie die Leitung bei der Steuerung und Koordination von grenzüberschreitenden M&A- und Restrukturierungsprojekten, die Steuer-Due-Diligence, Steuerstrukturierung, SPA-Prüfung, Steuer-Modellierung und steuerliche Beratungsleistungen nach Abschluss umfassen. Nutzen Sie dabei die Unterstützung von Associates und Senior Associates. - Arbeiten Sie mit dem Team zusammen, um die Praxis für Finanzdienstleistungen, Private Equity und Immobilien weiterzuentwickeln, um Kundenbeziehungen zu stärken, die Kundenbasis zu erweitern und das Dienstleistungsangebot zu diversifizieren. ## Anforderungen - Masterabschluss oder überdurchschnittlicher Bachelorabschluss in Betriebswirtschaftslehre, Volkswirtschaftslehre oder Jura. - Schwerpunkt Steuerrecht / Internationales Steuerrecht; ein LLM in Internationalem Steuerrecht ist ein Plus. - Mindestens 4 Jahre einschlägige Berufserfahrung in Steuerfragen und steuerlichen Aspekten von M&A in einem internationalen Umfeld. - Erfahrung mit Private-Equity- oder Immobilienkunden ist ein Plus. - Erfahrung in der Steuerung und Koordination von grenzüberschreitenden Steuerprojekten. - Fähigkeit, ein Team aus Senior Associates / Associates in komplexen Steuerprojekten zu führen und zu coachen. - Flexibilität, Ausdauer, Offenheit für herausfordernde und komplexe Situationen sowie eine team- und kundenorientierte Persönlichkeit mit ausgezeichneten Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - An der Schnittstelle zwischen Wirtschaft und Recht haben Sie ein Gespür für Zahlen, Modelle und Bewertungen sowie für die zugrundeliegenden rechtlichen Fragestellungen. - Sehr gute Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift; Deutsch und/oder weitere Sprachkenntnisse sind ein Plus.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description - Rejoignez une équipe multiculturelle et diversifiée où vous pourrez évoluer et prendre des responsabilités. - Vous pourrez vous épanouir dans un environnement de travail marqué par l’esprit d’équipe, la confiance et le soutien mutuel. - Vous développerez des compétences techniques approfondies et des soft skills grâce à des formations en présentiel et à distance. Travaillez au sein de notre équipe fiscale internationale en croissance dédiée aux services financiers à Zurich, en vous concentrant spécifiquement sur les fusions-acquisitions (M&A) et les restructurations. - Fournissez des conseils fiscaux de manière proactive à un portefeuille de clients diversifié, principalement composé de clients du private equity et de l’immobilier, en les conseillant sur les implications fiscales internationales liées aux fusions, acquisitions et restructurations. - Prenez la direction de la gestion et de la coordination de projets internationaux de M&A et de restructuration, incluant la due diligence fiscale, la structuration fiscale, l’examen des SPA, la modélisation fiscale et les services de conseil fiscal post-clôture, en vous appuyant sur le soutien d’associés et de seniors associates. - Collaborez avec l’équipe pour développer la pratique des services financiers, du private equity et de l’immobilier, afin de renforcer les relations clients, élargir la base de clients et diversifier l’offre de services. ## Exigences - Un master ou un bachelor avec une moyenne supérieure en administration des affaires, en économie ou en droit. - Une spécialisation en fiscalité / fiscalité internationale ; un LLM en fiscalité internationale serait un atout. - Au moins 4 ans d’expérience pertinente en fiscalité et en questions fiscales liées aux M&A dans un contexte international. - Une expérience avec des clients du private equity ou de l’immobilier est considérée comme un atout. - Expérience dans la gestion et la coordination de projets fiscaux multinationaux. - Capacité à diriger et à encadrer une équipe de seniors associates / associates sur des projets fiscaux complexes. - Vous êtes flexible, persévérant, ouvert aux situations stimulantes et complexes, et possédez une personnalité orientée vers l’équipe et le client avec d’excellentes compétences en communication. - À l’interface entre l’économie et le droit, vous avez un flair pour les chiffres, les modèles et les évaluations ainsi que pour les enjeux juridiques sous-jacents. - Excellente maîtrise de l’anglais à l’écrit et à l’oral ; l’allemand et/ou d’autres langues sont un plus.

titleByLocale.it: Reporting fiscale del fondo del gestore 80 - 100%
titleByLocale.fr: Déclaration fiscale du fonds de gestion 80 - 100 %

descriptionByLocale.it: In PwC accompagniamo i principali gestori di fondi, gli iniziatori di fondi e gli investitori istituzionali lungo l'intero ciclo di vita del fondo – dalle strutture UCITS classiche a veicoli di investimento alternativi complessi. Il nostro obiettivo è non solo implementare i requisiti normativi e fiscali, ma creare soluzioni sostenibili e future-proof. Per rafforzare il nostro team specializzato in Fund Tax Reporting, stiamo cercando una personalità manageriale esperta che combini una profonda competenza specialistica con leadership, proprietà e un vero orientamento al team. • Nel tuo ruolo di Manager, contribuisci attivamente a progetti complessi e lavori in un eccellente team collegiale all'intersezione tra tasse, regolamentazione e strutture di investimento: • Responsabilità per l'analisi fiscale di fondi di investimento svizzeri e stranieri, inclusi fondi UCITS e strutture di investimento alternative (ad esempio, mercati privati, fondi di fondi, strutture complesse di holding e fondi obiettivo) • Gestione completa dei report fiscali svizzeri annuali per fondi esteri – in stretta collaborazione con clienti esigenti e la nostra rete globale PwC • Supervisione del calcolo dei redditi imponibili per scopi fiscali svizzeri utilizzando moderne tecnologie di reporting fiscale PwC e garantendo la pubblicazione nell'elenco dei corsi dell'Amministrazione federale delle contribuzioni • Consulenza ai nostri clienti sulla contabilità fiscale dei fondi di investimento svizzeri, in particolare per i redditi derivanti da fondi obiettivo UCITS e alternativi • Assunzione della responsabilità di progetto e di qualità (scadenze, governance, rischi) con un chiaro focus su efficienza, scalabilità e sicurezza normativa • Contributo attivo all'automazione e alla digitalizzazione dei processi di Fund Tax Reporting come interfaccia tra esperti fiscali, IT e clienti • Mentoring e sviluppo professionale dei membri del team nonché contributo attivo a una cultura di team aperta, performante e rispettosa • Creazione e mantenimento di relazioni clienti a lungo termine e fiduciarie alla pari • Diploma universitario (Bachelor / Master) in economia, finanza, tasse o una formazione professionale superiore nel settore finanziario. • Almeno cinque anni di esperienza lavorativa rilevante nel settore Fund Tax Reporting, Fund Accounting o in una funzione comparabile • Esperienza nel trattare con strutture UCITS e veicoli di investimento alternativi, idealmente in un contesto internazionale • Gestione sicura di strutture di fondi complesse • Forte senso di responsabilità, pensiero imprenditoriale e piacere di promuovere temi • Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese e del tedesco • Affinità per soluzioni basate su tecnologia e dati • Personalità orientata al team con alta competenza sociale e comunicazione chiara
descriptionByLocale.en: At PwC, we support leading asset managers, fund initiators, and institutional investors throughout the entire fund lifecycle – from classic UCITS structures to complex alternative investment vehicles. Our goal is not only to implement regulatory and tax requirements but to create sustainable, future-proof solutions. To strengthen our specialized Fund Tax Reporting team, we are looking for an experienced managerial personality who combines deep specialist knowledge with leadership, ownership, and a genuine team orientation. • In your role as Manager, you actively shape demanding mandates and work in an excellent, collegial team at the interface of taxes, regulation, and investment structures: • Responsibility for the tax analysis of Swiss and foreign investment funds, including UCITS funds and alternative investment structures (e.g., private markets, fund-of-funds, complex holding and target fund structures) • End-to-end management of the annual Swiss tax reporting for foreign funds – in close collaboration with demanding customers and our global PwC network • Supervision of the calculation of taxable income for Swiss tax purposes using modern PwC tax reporting technologies and ensuring publication on the course list of the Federal Tax Administration • Advising our customers on the tax accounting of Swiss investment funds, particularly on income from UCITS and alternative target funds • Assuming project and quality responsibility (timelines, governance, risks) with a clear focus on efficiency, scalability, and regulatory security • Active contribution to the automation and digitalization of Fund Tax Reporting processes as an interface between tax experts, IT, and customers • Mentoring and professional development of team members as well as active contribution to an open, high-performance, and appreciative team culture • Building and maintaining long-term, trust-based customer relationships on an equal footing • University degree (Bachelor / Master) in business, finance, taxes, or higher professional training in the financial sector. • At least five years of relevant professional experience in Fund Tax Reporting, Fund Accounting, or a comparable function • Experience in dealing with UCITS structures and alternative investment vehicles, ideally in B. descriptionByLocale.fr: Chez PwC, nous accompagnons les principaux gestionnaires d'actifs, les initiateurs de fonds et les investisseurs institutionnels tout au long du cycle de vie des fonds – des structures UCITS classiques aux véhicules d'investissement alternatifs complexes. Notre objectif n'est pas seulement de mettre en œuvre les exigences réglementaires et fiscales, mais de créer des solutions durables et adaptées à l'avenir. Pour renforcer notre équipe spécialisée en Fund Tax Reporting, nous recherchons une personnalité managériale expérimentée qui combine une expertise approfondie avec le leadership, la propriété et une descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Sei parte di una squadra che non solo controlla i numeri ma riconosce le relazioni. A PwC nell'area di Audit – Commercio, Industrie e Servizi, si analizzano aziende di una vasta gamma di settori: Quanto hanno successo? Dove sono le opportunità e i rischi? Come possono diventare più sostenibili? Qui si lavora con persone curiosi e ambiziose per plasmare l'economia di domani – digitale, sostenibile e globale. Ogni progetto è unico e vi offre la possibilità di crescere e fare la differenza. La diversità è la nostra forza. La tua prospettiva conta e ti sosteniamo per raggiungere i tuoi obiettivi. ## Mansioni Non vuoi solo un lavoro, vuoi fare qualcosa? Benvenuti a PwC! Qui è possibile: - comprendere e trasformare le aziende: controllare i conti consolidati e annuali e assicurarsi che soddisfino i requisiti normativi - in loco, in ufficio o in modo flessibile dall'ufficio. - Digitalmente modellare il futuro: utilizzare strumenti moderni, AI e analisi dei dati per aumentare l'audit a un nuovo livello. Le tue idee valgono! - Promuovere la sostenibilità: sostenere la valutazione dei rapporti ESG e sostenere le aziende sul loro percorso verso una maggiore consapevolezza ambientale e responsabilità sociale. - Costruire reti: lavorare con team di leadership e CFO e collegare i contatti che modellano la tua carriera. - Responsabilità: Sviluppa le tue capacità di leadership in un team internazionale che ti incoraggia e ti ispira. Soprattutto nell'intensa Stagione Busy da gennaio a Pasqua, si contribuisce in modo decisivo al successo dei nostri clienti. ## Requisiti Nota: Se non sei ancora sicuro di come la vita quotidiana guarda nell'audit, prova la nostra esperienza di caso virtuale. In 3-4 ore è possibile risolvere le domande reali di affari e ottenere una panoramica della pratica. Con noi, la vostra personalità, le vostre abilità e la vostra volontà di rendere il mondo un po 'meglio. Quello che dovreste anche portare: - Siete almeno nella quarta. Semestre dei vostri studi (Bachelor/Master) nei settori dell'economia, (economico) dell'informatica, STEM o un altro campo di studio – siamo aperti a tutti. - Entusiasmo per figure, tendenze digitali e sostenibilità. - No. Il desiderio di lavorare in un ambiente internazionale e lavorare con persone provenienti da culture diverse. - Forte comunicazione in tedesco e inglese. - Spirito di squadra e la capacità di risolvere le sfide con idee fresche. # Cosa # offrono la tua prospettiva - Più di un semplice tirocinio Sappiamo che iniziare la carriera può essere emozionante, ma anche impegnativo. Ecco perché vi accompagniamo sulla vostra strada - con un piano chiaro e un forte sostegno: - flessibilità che vi si adatta: i nostri modelli di tempo di lavoro vi danno la libertà, la professione, l'apprendimento e il tempo libero per conciliare. - Mentoring e sviluppo: Siete accompagnati da colleghi esperti che vi promuovono e vi ispirano. - Un team che ti rafforza: con noi troverai una comunità che apprezza la diversità, celebra idee e ti incoraggia a crescere oltre di te. ## Contatto Hai delle domande?
descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione You are part of a team that not only checks numbers but recognizes relationships. At PwC in the area of Audit – Trade, Industries and Services, you analyze companies from a wide range of industries: How successful are they? Where are opportunities and risks? How can they become more sustainable? Here you work with curious and ambitious people to shape the economy of tomorrow – digital, sustainable and global. Each project is unique and offers you the chance to grow and make a difference. Diversity is our strength. Your perspective counts and we support you to achieve your goals. ## Mansioni You don't just want a job, you want to do something? Welcome to PwC! Here you can: - understand and transform companies: check consolidated and annual accounts and make sure they meet regulatory requirements - on site, in the office or flexibly from the home office. - Digitally shape the future: Use modern tools, AI and data analysis to raise the audit to a new level. Your ideas count! - Promote sustainability: support the assessment of ESG reports and support companies on their path to more environmental awareness and social responsibility. - Build networks: work with leadership teams and CFOs and connect contacts that will shape your career. - Responsibility: Develop your leadership skills in an international team that encourages and inspires you. Especially in the intense Busy Season from January to Easter, you make a decisive contribution to the success of our customers. ## Requisiti Note: If you are still unsure how everyday life looks in the audit, try out our Virtual Case Experience. In 3–4 hours you can solve real business questions and gain an insight into the practice. With us, your personality, your skills and your will to make the world a bit better. What you should also bring: - You are at least in the 4th. Semester of your studies (Bachelor/Master) in the fields of economics, (economic) informatics, STEM or another field of study – we are open to all. - Enthusiasm for figures, digital trends and sustainability. - The desire to work in an international environment and work with people from different cultures. - Strong communication in German and English. - Team spirit and the ability to solve challenges with fresh ideas. ## Cosa offriamo Your Perspective – More than just an internship We know that starting the career can be exciting, but also challenging. This is why we accompany you on your way - with a clear plan and strong support: - flexibility that suits you: our working time models give you the freedom, profession, learning and leisure to reconcile. - Mentoring and development: You are accompanied by experienced colleagues who promote and inspire you. - A team that strengthens you: with us you will find a community that appreciates diversity, celebrates ideas and encourages you to grow beyond you. ## Contatto Do you have any questions?
descriptionByLocale.de:
## Descrizione
Du bist Teil eines Teams, das nicht nur Zahlen prüft, sondern Zusammenhänge erkennt. Bei PwC im Bereich Audit – Trade, Industries and Services analysierst du Unternehmen verschiedenster Branchen: Wie erfolgreich sind sie? Wo liegen Chancen und Risiken? Wie können sie nachhaltiger werden? Hier arbeitest du mit neugierigen und ambitionierten Menschen, um die Wirtschaft von morgen zu gestalten – digital, nachhaltig und global. Jedes Projekt ist einzigartig und bietet dir die Chance, zu wachsen und einen Unterschied zu machen. Vielfalt ist unsere Stärke. Deine Perspektive zählt, und wir unterstützen dich, deine Ziele zu erreichen.

## Mansioni
Du willst nicht einfach nur einen Job, sondern etwas bewirken? Willkommen bei PwC! Hier kannst du:
- Unternehmen verstehen und transformieren: Prüfe Konzern- und Jahresabschlüsse und stelle sicher, dass diese den regulatorischen Anforderungen entsprechen - vor Ort, im Office oder flexibel aus dem Homeoffice.
- Digital die Zukunft gestalten: Nutze modernste Tools, KI und Datenanalyse, um die Wirtschaftsprüfung auf ein neues Level zu heben. Deine Ideen zählen!
- Nachhaltigkeit vorantreiben: Unterstütze bei der Prüfung von ESG-Berichten und begleite Unternehmen auf ihrem Weg zu mehr Umweltbewusstsein und sozialer Verantwortung.
- Netzwerke aufbauen: Arbeite mit Führungsteams und CFOs zusammen und knüpfe Kontakte, die deine Karriere prägen werden.
- Verantwortung übernehmen: Entwickle deine Leadership-Skills in einem internationalen Team, das dich fördert und inspiriert. Besonders in der intensiven Busy Season von Januar bis Ostern leistest du einen entscheidenden Beitrag zum Erfolg unserer Kunden.

## Requisiti
Hinweis: Falls du noch unsicher bist, wie der Alltag in der Wirtschaftsprüfung aussieht, probiere unsere Virtual Case Experience aus. In 3–4 Stunden kannst du reale betriebswirtschaftliche Fragestellungen lösen und einen Einblick in die Praxis gewinnen.
Bei uns zählen deine Persönlichkeit, deine Skills und dein Wille, die Welt ein Stück besser zu machen. Was du ausserdem mitbringen solltest:
- Du befindest dich mindestens im 4. Semester deines Studiums (Bachelor/Master) in den Bereichen Wirtschaftswissenschaften, (Wirtschafts-)Informatik, STEM oder einer anderen Studienrichtung – wir sind für alle offen.
- Begeisterung für Zahlen, digitale Trends und Nachhaltigkeit.
- Den Wunsch, in einem internationalen Umfeld zu arbeiten und mit Menschen aus verschiedenen Kulturen zusammenzuarbeiten.
- Kommunikationsstark in Deutsch und Englisch.
- Teamgeist und die Fähigkeit, Herausforderungen mit frischen Ideen zu lösen.

## Cosa offriamo
Deine Perspektive – Mehr als nur ein Praktikum
Wir wissen, dass der Start ins Berufsleben aufregend, aber auch herausfordernd sein kann. Deshalb begleiten wir dich auf deinem Weg - mit einem klaren Plan und starker Unterstützung:
- Flexibilität, die zu dir passt: Unsere Arbeitszeitmodelle geben dir die Freiheit, Beruf, Lernen und Freizeit in Einklang zu bringen.
- Mentoring und Entwicklung: Du wirst von erfahrenen Kolleg:innen begleitet, die dich fördern und inspirieren.
- Ein Team, das dich stärkt: Bei uns findest du eine Gemeinschaft, die Vielfalt schätzt, Ideen feiert und dich ermutigt, über dich hinauszuwachsen.

## Contatto
Hast du Fragen?
